_description: Image-forward spotlight card. The top 55% holds a featured photo that fades into the background color; the bottom 45% holds text. Ideal for team intros, testimonials, product features, or quote cards with a portrait. Keep bg and ink consistent across all slides; vary only accent.

_slots.image: REQUIRED — featured image. Headshot, product photo, or scene. Displayed in the top portion (1056px tall) with object-fit: cover. Landscape and portrait photos both work — the crop is center-focused. Local path or URL.
_slots.heading: REQUIRED — primary text below the image. A name, quote, or short title. 2–10 words at 80px bold serif.
_slots.body: optional — supporting text. Role, attribution, or 1–3 sentences. Shown at reduced opacity.
_slots.eyebrow: optional — short uppercase label above the rule (e.g. 'FOUNDER', 'TESTIMONIAL', 'FEATURED'). Displayed in accent color.
_slots.footer: optional — bottom-left text. Handle, brand, or attribution (e.g. '@yourcompany').
_slots.bg: optional — background hex color. Also the gradient-fade target from the image. Use the SAME value on every slide. Default: #0c0b09
_slots.ink: optional — primary text hex color. Use the SAME value on every slide. Default: #eae6de
_slots.accent: optional — accent hex color for eyebrow, rule, and top bar. VARY per slide. Default: #d4a054

title: Meet the Team

slides.heading: Alex Chen
slides.body: Built three startups before turning thirty. Believes the best code is the code you delete.

slides.heading: Maya Rodriguez
slides.body: Fifteen years shaping interfaces at companies you've used today. Obsessed with whitespace.

slides.heading: James Okafor
slides.body: Systems thinker. Turns messy problems into clean architectures.

slides.heading: Priya Sharma
slides.body: Scaled two products from zero to a million users. Data-driven but story-first.
